mapper.sql: A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.NMAX_SEQ, A.SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

,B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM ,C.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM ,D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM ,E.SLVL_NM AS HIGHNODE ,NVL(CASE WHEN ORD.CNT >= 1 THEN ORD.CNT END,0) AS ORDERSONCNT ,NVL(CASE WHEN NE.CNT >= 1 THEN NE.CNT END,0) AS FMCNT ,F.SSVC_HIGH_CD

,MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B ,MST.TB_LVL_CD C ,MST.TB_LVL_CD D ,MST.TB_LVL_CD E ,MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST F ,( SELECT SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SSVC_OBJ_CD , COUNT (SSVC_OFFICE_CD ) CNT FROM MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_SUB GROUP BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SSVC_OBJ_CD ) NE , ( SELECT SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SLVL_CD , COUNT (SLOFFICECODE) CNT FROM MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD GROUP BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SLVL_CD ) ORD
AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = C.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = D.SLVL_CD (+)

AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = NE.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = NE.SSVC_OBJ_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = ORD.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = ORD.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = F.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = F.SSVC_GROUP_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = F.SSVC_OBJ_CD(+) AND F.SSVC_HIGH_CD = E.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD (+) AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = C.SLVL_CD (+) AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = D.SLVL_CD (+)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST.TB_LVL_BAS ( SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SSVC_GROUP_CD , SSVC_OBJ_CD , NMAX_SEQ , SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD , SCREATE_ID , SMODIFY_ID ) SELECT SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_OBJ_CD, MAX(nlvl_mst_seq), #{slvlBasLevelCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, SCREATE_ID, SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND SSVC_GROUP_CD = #{ssvcGroupCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND SSVC_OBJ_CD = #{ssvcObjCd, jdbcType=CHAR} GROUP BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_OBJ_CD, SCREATE_ID, SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A
AND D.SLVL_NM ILIKE '%' || #{ssvcObjNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'

SELECT '' AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , '전체' AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ,B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A ,MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B WHERE A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD = 'LL0001' ORDER BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC

SELECT DISTINCT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ,B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A ,MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B WHERE A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD != 'CL0000' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD != 'CL0007' ORDER BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT DISTINCT A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , B.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A ,MST.TB_LVL_CD B WHERE A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SLVL_CD AND B.SORG_OFFICE_FLAG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SSVC_GROUP_CD ASC
SELECT DISTINCT A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , B.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A ,MST.TB_LVL_CD B WHERE A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = B.SLVL_CD AND B.SORG_OFFICE_FLAG_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SSVC_OBJ_CD ASC

SELECT
count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = #{ssvcGroupCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = '000000'
